news.summary: In Tampa, Florida, on April 17, 2025, Better Choice Company, Inc. (NYSE American: BTTR), a pet health and wellness firm, revealed that the Board of Directors sanctioned a stock dividend of 0.35 per share for each common stock share held. Furthermore, they indicated on April 8, 2025, that the payable date for the stock dividend had been shifted from April 17, 2025, to April 21, 2025.
news.headline: Better Choice Co. to pay stock dividend of 0.35 per share on April 21, 2025 (previously April 17, 2025).

news.summary: The first EnviroCharge Bollinger B4 Truck will undergo upfitting to serve as a Mobile Charging Unit, set to be unveiled at the ACT Expo on April 28, 2025. This innovative move demonstrates the commitment to sustainable transportation solutions. The event will showcase the truck's capabilities as a key player in the shift towards eco-friendly mobility. Save the date to witness this milestone in the industry as it unfolds with promising features and a vision for a greener future.
news.headline: Bollinger Motors delivers first electric truck to EnviroCharge for use as mobile charging unit at ACT Expo on April 28, 2025.

news.summary: Recent studies have revealed that robotic-assisted procedures have played a crucial role in expanding access to minimally invasive healthcare. The research has highlighted that the utilization of robotic technology has led to a significant increase in the availability of minimally invasive procedures, making them more accessible to a larger population. This advancement has been particularly notable in the field of surgery, with the numbers indicating a substantial rise in the use of robotic assistance. The findings underscore the importance of incorporating robotic-assisted techniques in healthcare to improve the reach of minimally invasive care to a wider demographic.
news.headline: Research examines benefits of robotic-assisted surgery for increased access to minimally invasive care.

news.summary: On April 17, 2025, in Dublin, BrowserStack, a prominent software testing platform, revealed details about Breakpoint 2025, their primary yearly conference scheduled for May 13-15, 2025. The virtual event, titled 'AI Agents: The New Era of Intelligent Testing', is expected to bring together more than 20,000 participants.
news.headline: BrowserStack announces Breakpoint 2025 conference from May 13-15, themed 'AI Agents: The New Era of Intelligent Testing', gathering over 20,000 attendees.

news.summary: In Wilmington, Delaware on April 17, 2025, Arkieva, a prominent company offering supply chain planning software and consulting services, revealed that it has been recognized as a Challenger in the 2025 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Supply Chain Planning Solutions. This achievement signifies a significant milestone for Arkieva as it is the 10th time the company has secured a spot on the prestigious list.
news.headline: Arkieva named Challenger in 2025 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Supply Chain Planning Solutions, 10th year in a row.

news.summary: In Fishers, Indiana, on April 17, 2025, Mainscape, Inc. has been honored with the USA TODAY Top Workplaces award for the second consecutive year. This award highlights companies that prioritize creating outstanding work environments for their employees. Mainscape, Inc. joins the ranks of over 42,000 organizations recognized for this accolade.
news.headline: Mainscape, Inc. wins 2025 USA Today Top Workplaces Award for 2nd year in a row, highlighting exceptional employee work environment.

news.summary: In Palm Beach, Florida on April 17, 2025, new reports from FN Media Group suggest a positive trend in the global drone market. Recent findings indicate significant advancement in the industry compared to earlier expectations. The global drone sector has shown notable progress, with a growing market size and increasing market share. This update underscores the promising direction of the industry with key metrics pointing towards a brighter future.
news.headline: Global drone industry expected to expand further, showing resilience and adaptability. Multi-billion dollar market.报道表明全球无人机市场前景较先前预期更好，将进一步扩大。多亿元市场。

news.summary: Today, in Sunrise, Florida, the prominent provider of emergency medical transportation coverage in the U.S. and 14 international markets, MASA®, revealed its new name. This change signifies a broader dedication to assisting members in overcoming obstacles to accessing medical care. The company's expansion now includes 14 global markets, reflecting its commitment to supporting individuals in emergency situations.
news.headline: MASA unveils new positioning as Medical Access & Service Advantage, focusing on helping members overcome medical care barriers in US and 14 international markets.

news.summary: In Dallas on April 17, 2025, Argent Trust Company, acting as the trustee for the San Juan Basin Royalty Trust (NYSE: SJT), announced that it will not be providing a monthly cash distribution to holders of its Units of beneficial interest at this time.
news.headline: San Juan Basin Royalty Trust (NYSE: SJT) will not distribute cash to holders for April 2025. Trustee announced decision.

news.summary: DANIA BEACH, Fla., April 17, 2025 - Spirit Aviation Holdings, Inc., the parent company of Spirit Airlines, LLC, revealed new leadership appointments today. The Board of Directors has named Dave Davis as the President and Chief Executive Officer of the company.
news.headline: Spirit Airlines appoints Dave Davis as President and CEO. New leadership appointments announced.

news.summary: On April 17, 2025, based in Downers Grove, Illinois, CompTIA, a prominent global vendor-neutral IT training and certification provider, is directing attention towards the influence of artificial intelligence (AI) on cybersecurity professions. They are emphasizing the implications for jobs, skills, training, and certifications in this field.
news.headline: CompTIA focuses on AI and cybersecurity at RSAC 2025. Leading provider of IT training and certification.
ECB's President Lagarde: Tariffs impact is possibly negative on growth.

news.summary: Trex Company, Inc. [NYSE: TREX], the leading manufacturer of wood-alternative decking and residential railing products, will release its first quarter 2025 earnings on May 8, 2025, after the U.S. market closes. A conference call with senior management will take place on the same day at 5:00 PM ET. Trex is recognized for its high-performance and low-maintenance outdoor living solutions. Stay tuned for further updates.
news.headline: Trex Co. to release Q1 2025 earnings on May 8 after market close, conference call with senior management at 5:00 PM ET.

news.summary: SmartRent, based in Phoenix, has announced that it will be releasing its financial results for the first quarter of 2025. The company will be hosting a conference call on May 7, 2025, to discuss these results.
news.headline: SmartRent to release Q1 2025 financial results and hold conference call on May 7, 2025 in Phoenix.

news.summary: A new product line featuring a low global warming potential refrigerant has been introduced by Mitsubishi Electric Trane HVAC US LLC in Suwanee, Georgia. The company has unveiled this innovative line to address environmental concerns while providing efficient HVAC solutions. This launch signifies a commitment to reducing environmental impact and promoting sustainability in the industry. The new line is designed to meet the latest standards and regulations, offering customers an eco-friendly choice. Mitsubishi Electric Trane HVAC aims to offer products that contribute to a greener future, with an emphasis on reducing greenhouse gas emissions. This initiative underscores the company's dedication to innovation and environmental responsibility.
news.headline: Mitsubishi Electric Trane HVAC US debuts new heat pump line with low GWP refrigerant in SUWANEE, Ga.

news.summary: In Pasadena, California, Tetra Tech, Inc. (NASDAQ: TTEK) shares that the City of Bartlesville, Oklahoma awarded them a contract. Tetra Tech, a prominent provider of consulting and engineering services in water, environment, and sustainable infrastructure, will offer engineering design and technical services for Oklahoma's inaugural indirect potable reuse (IPR) project. This project builds on Tetra Tech's earlier IPR pilot study.
news.headline: Tetra Tech wins contract for first IPR project in Oklahoma,  City of Bartlesville awards design and tech services.

news.summary: Empire State Realty Trust, Inc. shared that they have sealed a renewed lease deal along with a significant 12,338 square foot expansion with Workday, Inc., recognized for their AI platform handling human resources, finances, and operations. This agreement brings their total leased space at the renowned Empire State Building to 39,069 square feet. The continuous growth partnership between Workday and ESRT began in 2015 when the company initially leased a prebuilt suite at One Grand Central Place. The expansion signifies Workday’s commitment to developing their presence at the iconic Empire State Building.
news.headline: Workday renews & expands lease at Empire State Building, totaling 39k sq ft. Growing since 2015, thrilled for the expansion.
Senior US Official, on trade: The US is open, available and ready to make deals.
ECB's President Lagarde: There will be re-routing of goods.

news.summary: INVL Technology has successfully completed its share buy-back process, acquiring a total of 53,749 shares at a value of approximately EUR 188,121.50, excluding brokerage fees.
news.headline: INVL Technology completes share buy-back, purchases 53,749 shares for EUR 188,121.50.
ECB's President Lagarde: The most obvious EU response is zero for zero tariff offer.

news.summary: In its second year, the Cobalt Awards recognition program, hosted by Jack Henry™ (Nasdaq: JKHY) in MONETT, Mo., is underway. Entries for the 2025 awards are being accepted until May 12. The program aims to honor creativity and community dedication, particularly showcasing innovation within financial institutions.
news.headline: Jack Henry accepting entries for 2025 Cobalt Awards until May 12, to celebrate financial innovation and community dedication.
Mexico's Sheinbaum: The talk with Trump was productive, we will keep dialog.

news.summary: Starting on May 5th, Plum Paper will be offering a 25% discount on all items available on their website, including new neutral layouts, covers, and accessories. The company, based in San Diego, will be honoring the hard work and dedication of planners who help keep everything in order. This promotion will be running throughout the month, providing a great opportunity for customers to save on their purchases.
news.headline: Plum Paper offers 25% off sitewide for a customer appreciation sale in May, honoring nurses, teachers, moms, and planners.

news.summary: In Atlanta on April 17, 2025, Vaycaychella, Inc. (OTC Pink: VAYK) revealed a correction in its annual report, fixing a significant clerical mistake. The updated report now discloses an operating revenue of $668,000 for the fiscal year 2024. The amended report was officially submitted by the company's management.
news.headline: VAYK corrects clerical error, reports $668K in operating revenue for 2024.

news.summary: In Beverly Hills, California on April 17, 2025, the 22nd Annual Living Legends of Aviation Awards ceremony is scheduled to take place on April 25, 2025 at The Beverly Hilton Hotel. This event aims to recognize individuals who have made notable contributions to the fields of aviation and aerospace. Among the honorees is John Travolta, known as the "Official..."
news.headline: John Travolta to host 22nd Annual Living Legends of Aviation Awards in Beverly Hills on April 25th, 2025. Aerial fire crew heroes to be honored.

news.summary: Belmont Village Senior Living in Houston has been honored with the prestigious 2025 Best Senior Living Awards by U.S. News & World Report. The award highlights the excellence and quality of care provided by Belmont Village Senior Living in the senior living sector. This recognition is a testament to the exceptional services offered by the facility, showcasing their commitment to the well-being and comfort of seniors. This award underscores Belmont Village Senior Living's position as a top-tier provider in the industry.
news.headline: Belmont Village Senior Living wins Best Senior Living Award in 2025 by U.S. News & World Report.

news.summary: In London on April 17, 2025, the digital finance platform ZND, managed by the European digital asset exchange zondacrypto, announced a significant milestone. They have successfully obtained a $20 million token investment commitment from Rollman Management Digital. This infusion of funds will be used to further enhance their technology and development efforts.
news.headline: ZND receives $20 million investment from Rollman Management Digital to boost digital finance platform growth.

news.summary: Health-E Commerce, the parent brand of FSA Store and HSA Store, has expanded its telehealth services to include prescription weight management medications. The company, based in Dallas, announced this move on April 17, 2025, through a press release. The online shopping platform now offers a wider range of services aimed at supporting health, with a focus on utilizing FSA Store and HSA Store. This development signifies a significant growth in the company's offerings, catering to the increasing demand for telehealth services. With the inclusion of these medications, customers now have access to a more comprehensive selection of products to manage their health through telehealth channels.
news.headline: Health-E Commerce has launched a new online platform for FSA and HSA users to buy prescription weight management medications.

news.summary: Get ready for a smooth transition to achieving quantum safety as PKWARE, based in Milwaukee, Wisconsin, revealed on April 17, 2025, its quantum readiness assessment and encryption tools to aid companies in safeguarding critical data from quantum computing dangers. Quantum security is imperative as technologies advance, and PKWARE's solutions aim to address this threat effectively.
news.headline: PKWARE releases quantum readiness assessment to protect data from quantum threats. MILWAUKEE, 4/17/25 - Helps organizations prepare for seamless transition.

news.summary: On April 17, 2025, in Bedford, Massachusetts, Lexington Medical revealed a significant development in their company. A notable leader in minimally-invasive surgical stapling solutions, Lexington disclosed a strategic investment from Ampersand Capital Partners. Ampersand, a private equity firm focusing on growth equity investments, has decided to invest in Lexington to support its operations and expansion. This move marks a key milestone for Lexington as it continues to advance in the medical industry.
news.headline: Lexington Medical receives growth investment from Ampersand Capital Partners, private equity firm specializing in growth equity investments.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Komodo Health, a leading provider of real-world data and healthcare analytics, revealed an enhanced collaboration with Databricks, a prominent Data and AI firm. This partnership aims to offer in-depth patient journey insights using Databricks Marketplace and Delta Sharing. By utilizing the Databricks Data Intelligence Platform, Komodo's Healthcare Map® will now be more accessible and scalable, providing unparalleled insights. This strategic alliance signifies a significant step towards improving healthcare analytics.
news.headline: Komodo Health partners with Databricks for real-time healthcare data access, enhancing patient journey insights via Delta Sharing.

news.summary: In Seattle, Chief Information Security Officers (CISOs) are largely in favor of the current Administration's Executive Order aimed at removing regulations hindering AI innovation. A survey of 500 U.S.-based CISOs highlighted that a significant majority support this EO. However, it was also noted that many CISOs express concerns that deregulation could increase the complexity of securing their organizations. As a result, there is a shift towards prioritizing resilience within their security strategies. These insights were gathered from a Censuswide survey commissioned by Absolute.
news.headline: CISOs support AI innovation, worry about policy rollback impact on job difficulty - findings from survey of 500 US CISOs.
Europe’s financial watchdogs question Treasuries’ haven status.
ECB's President Lagarde: Other governors (weeks ago) thought it might warrant 50 bps.

news.summary: Shares of State Street Corporation (NYSE: STT) are down after the company released its first quarter results. The company reported earnings per share of $2.04 for the quarter, surpassing the analyst consensus of $1.99. However, quarterly sales came in at $3.28 billion, a 4.7% increase compared to the previous year but falling short of the expected $3.32 billion. State Street stated, "Through year-over-year fee revenue growth and expense control, we achieved positive fee and total operating leverage with pre-tax margin expansion, while also returning capital to shareholders."
news.headline: State Street (NYSE: STT) beats EPS at $2.04 but misses revenue at $3.28B (+4.7% YoY). CEO highlights resilience amid global uncertainty.

news.summary: In Grand Baie, Mauritius on April 17, 2025, Alphamin Resources Corp (AFM:TSXV, APH:JSE AltX) shared an operational update. The company, referred to as Alphamin, notified of progress in its operations.
news.headline: Alphamin Resources Corp. shares Q1 2025 operational update; based in Grand Baie, Mauritius; traded on AFM:TSXV, APH:JSE AltX.

news.summary: The world's premier Smart Solar Spotlight featuring MPPT charging controller technology boasting an impressive 89.9% charging efficiency has been introduced by Linkind, a brand under AiDot. On April 17, 2025, LOS ANGELES, the SL5C model was officially launched, heralded as the globe's first smart solar spotlight with cutting-edge capabilities.
news.headline: AiDot's Linkind introduces SL5C Smart Solar Spotlight, featuring MPPT tech for 89.9% charging efficiency. LA, 4/17/25.

news.summary: Aritzia Inc., a company listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbol ATZ, is set to unveil its financial performance for the fourth quarter of fiscal year 2025 on May 1, 2025, after the market closes. Following this release, a conference call will be held to delve deeper into the earnings outcomes. The conference is scheduled for Thursday, May 1, 2025. The specific time for the call has not been disclosed yet.
news.headline: Aritzia Inc. (TSX: ATZ) plans to release Q4 fiscal 2025 results on May 1, 2025, followed by a conference call.

ECB's President Lagarde: We need to rely on safe, reliable data.

news.summary: In New York, BTG Pactual Timberland Investment Group (BTG Pactual TIG) and Conservation International have reached a notable milestone in their Latin American reforestation initiative by commencing restoration efforts on over 10,000 hectares of native and diverse Cerrado vegetation in Brazil. As reported by the Brazilian Restoration and Reforestation Observatory, this development expands the overall restoration area in the Cerrado region, where native vegetation has been significantly restored.
news.headline: Over 10,000 hectares of Cerrado in Brazil are being restored, improving biodiversity and climate impact.

news.summary: Monumental Energy Corp. has released an update regarding its workover wells, Copper Moki 1 & 2, in partnership with New Zealand Energy Corp. The Canadian company has paid a total of $345,000 CAD, which includes a recent deposit of $92,000 CAD to rig contractor RIVAL. The workover operation is taking place in the Taranaki basin of New Zealand, with Monumental covering costs for essential parts and services. The company's stock is listed as TSX-V: MNRG, FSE: ZA6, and OTCQB: MNMRF.
news.headline: Monumental Energy Corp provides update on Copper Moki 1 & 2 wells in New Zealand. Paid $345,000 with $92,000 deposit to rig contractor.
